## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

List commands you ran and key outcomes.

## Checklist

- [ ] Changes are scoped and reviewable.
- [ ] I ran relevant checks for the touched area.
- [ ] I ran `just check` for mixed or shared changes.
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated docs when setup or behavior changed.
- [ ] I did not commit generated output from `.artifacts/`.
- [ ] I ran `just security-scan` when touching integration/auth/export logic.

## Notes for Reviewers

Call out risks, migrations, contract changes, or follow-up work.
